_meta.description: DDInter Code B — Drug-Drug Interaction data for blood/cardiovascular-related medications. Flags dangerous combinations involving anticoagulants, antiplatelets, and related drugs.
_meta.source: Simplified subset of DDInter database for hackathon demo

interactions.recommendation: Avoid combination unless specifically indicated. Monitor INR closely.

interactions.effect: Dual anticoagulation — very high bleeding risk
interactions.recommendation: Should not be co-prescribed. Escalate to pharmacist immediately.

interactions.effect: Triple antithrombotic risk when combined with aspirin
interactions.recommendation: Requires specialist review. Limit duration if unavoidable.

interactions.effect: Omeprazole may increase warfarin effect (higher INR)
interactions.recommendation: Monitor INR. Consider pantoprazole as alternative PPI.
Use with caution. Ensure clinical indication for both.

interactions.effect: Dual antiplatelet therapy — increased bleeding risk
interactions.recommendation: Standard post-stent therapy but monitor for bleeding signs.
Monitor closely. Short-term use only if required.

interactions.effect: Minor increase in warfarin effect possible
interactions.recommendation: Monitor INR when starting or changing statin dose.
